name: Oblex Spawn
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Amorphous
traits.desc: Can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without squeezing.

actions.name: Pseudopod
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4+3) bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) psychic damage.

tactics: Weak alone but scouts for its parent adult oblex.
actionEconomy: Single pseudopod.
encounterNotes: Wherever an adult oblex lurks.

name: Flumph
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Advanced Telepathy
traits.desc: Can perceive telepathic communication within 60 ft.; can't be surprised by creatures with telepathy.

traits.name: Telepathic Shroud
traits.desc: Immune to effects sensing emotions/thoughts and all divination spells.

actions.name: Tendrils
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) acid damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 10 Con save or reek of musk for 1 hour.

actions.name: Stench Spray (1/Day)
actions.desc: 15-foot line; DC 12 Str save or coated in smelly liquid for 8 hours.

tactics: Rarely fights. Shares Underdark intelligence, especially about mind flayer colonies.
actionEconomy: Tendrils or Stench Spray. Primarily social.
encounterNotes: Underdark. The most unlikely ally adventurers can find.

name: Choker
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Aberrant Quickness (Recharge 5-6)
traits.desc: The choker takes an extra action on its turn.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.desc: Can climb difficult surfaces including ceilings without checks.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Tentacle attacks.

actions.name: Tentacle
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4+3) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13) and restrained. The choker has two tentacles, each grappling one target.

tactics: Two tentacles restrain two targets. Aberrant Quickness for extra action. Hangs from ceilings.
actionEconomy: Two tentacle attacks plus extra action on recharge.
encounterNotes: Caves and dungeons. Ambushes from above.

name: Berbalang
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Spectral Duplicate (Recharges after a Long Rest)
traits.desc: As a bonus action, creates one spectral duplicate in an unoccupied space within 30 ft. While duplicate exists, berbalang is unconscious. Duplicate has 1 HP and berbalang's stats.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two attacks: one Bite and one Claw.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) psychic damage.

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4+2) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) psychic damage.

tactics: Creates spectral duplicate as decoy while it hides. Both attacks deal heavy psychic damage.
actionEconomy: Two attacks per action. Duplicate as bonus action distraction.
encounterNotes: Ruins. Feeds on psychic energy of the dead.

name: Deathlock
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
languages: The languages it knew in life

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.desc: Cha-based (spell save DC 13). At will: detect magic, hellish rebuke (2d10). 2/day each: arms of Hadar, hold person, invisibility. 1/day: hunger of Hadar.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Deathly Claw attacks.

actions.name: Deathly Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6+3) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage.

tactics: Two claw attacks with heavy necrotic. Hunger of Hadar for AoE blindness. Hold Person to lock a PC. Warlock raised as undead.
actionEconomy: Two claw attacks plus warlock spellcasting.
encounterNotes: Undead lairs and warlock cults. A warlock who died serving its patron and was raised to continue.

name: Deathlock Wight
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
damageResistances: bludgeoning/piercing/slashing from nonmagical attacks not made with silvered weapons
languages: The languages it knew in life

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.desc: Disadvantage on attacks and Perception (sight) in sunlight.

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.desc: Cha-based (spell save DC 12). At will: detect magic, disguise self. 1/day each: fear, hold person, misty step.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Deathly Claw attacks.

actions.name: Deathly Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6+3) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage.

actions.name: Life Drain
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d6+3) necrotic damage, and the target's hit point maximum is reduced by the amount until it finishes a long rest.

tactics: Two necrotic claws. Life Drain reduces HP max. Misty Step for repositioning. Fear to route enemies.
actionEconomy: Two claw attacks plus spellcasting.
encounterNotes: Warlock patron servants. Mid-tier undead warlock.

name: Deathlock Mastermind
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
languages: The languages it knew in life

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.desc: Cha-based (spell save DC 13). At will: detect magic, disguise self, hellish rebuke. 3/day each: counterspell, dispel magic, hunger of Hadar. 1/day each: circle of death, dominate monster, fly.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Deathly Claw attacks.

actions.name: Deathly Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6+3) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) necrotic damage.

tactics: Circle of Death for massive AoE. Dominate Monster for control. Counterspell to shut enemy casters. Commands undead cells.
actionEconomy: Two claw attacks plus high-level spellcasting.
encounterNotes: The most powerful undead warlock. Commands secret cults.

name: Babau
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

traits.name: Wounding Strike
traits.desc: Once per turn when the babau hits with a melee attack, it can force the target to make a DC 13 Con save. On failure, the target takes 9 (2d8) necrotic damage and its speed is reduced by 10 ft.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with Weakening Gaze.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8+4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Weakening Gaze
actions.desc: One creature within 30 ft. must succeed on a DC 13 Con save or take 9 (2d8) necrotic damage and have its Strength reduced by 1d6 until the end of its next turn.

tactics: Two claws plus Wounding Strike slows movement. Weakening Gaze reduces Strength. High stealth for ambushes. Demon assassin.
actionEconomy: Two attacks plus optional Weakening Gaze replace.
encounterNotes: Demonic cults. Sent by demon lords to eliminate specific targets.

name: Bulezau
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Rotting Presence
traits.desc: When a creature that isn't a demon starts its turn within 30 ft. of the bulezau, it must succeed on a DC 13 Con save or take 1d6 necrotic damage.

traits.name: Standing Leap
traits.desc: Long jump up to 20 ft., high jump up to 10 ft.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Barbed Tail attacks.

actions.name: Barbed Tail
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4+4) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Con save or become infected with a disease that prevents healing and reduces max HP by 7 (2d6) every 24 hours.

tactics: Rotting Presence damages nearby non-demons passively. Two tail attacks with disease. Area denial creature.
actionEconomy: Two barbed tail attacks per action. Rotting Presence is passive.
encounterNotes: Demon-infested areas. The disease prevents natural healing.

name: Rutterkin
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Corrupt Water
traits.desc: At the start of each of its turns, the rutterkin causes all watery substances within 10 ft. to magically become contaminated. A creature that drinks it must succeed on a DC 13 Con save or become poisoned until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8+4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Blinding Mucus (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The rutterkin spits mucus at a creature within 20 ft. The creature must succeed on a DC 13 Dex save or be blinded until the end of the rutterkin's next turn.

tactics: Strong bite. Blinding Mucus on recharge. Corrupt Water spoils water sources. Dangerous in packs.
actionEconomy: Single bite plus Blinding Mucus on recharge.
encounterNotes: Abyssal encounters and demonic warbands. Cannon fodder that still hits hard.

name: Skulk
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Fallible Invisibility
traits.desc: The skulk is invisible. This invisibility ends when the skulk attacks or is hit by an attack.

traits.name: Rampage
traits.desc: When the skulk reduces a creature to 0 HP with a melee attack, it can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make a bite attack.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6+4) slashing damage.

tactics: Invisible until it attacks or is hit. Two claw attacks from invisibility give advantage. Rampage after kills.
actionEconomy: Two claw attacks per action from invisibility.
encounterNotes: Ruins. Born from the Shadowfell, haunt places of regret.

name: Allip
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
languages: The languages it knew in life; telepathy 60 ft.

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
traits.desc: Can move through creatures and objects as difficult terrain.

traits.name: Maddening Whispers (Recharge 5-6)
traits.desc: A creature that can hear the allip within 30 ft. must succeed on a DC 14 Wis save or take 21 (6d6) psychic damage and be stunned until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Maddening Touch
actions.desc: Melee Spell Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 17 (3d8+4) psychic damage.

actions.name: Whispers of Madness
actions.desc: One creature the allip can see within 60 ft. must succeed on a DC 14 Wis save or take 14 (4d6) psychic damage and be frightened until the end of the allip's next turn.

tactics: Maddening Whispers stuns all who hear it. Maddening Touch for direct psychic damage. Incorporeal for wall passage.
actionEconomy: Maddening Touch attack plus Whispers of Madness. Whispers on recharge for AoE stun.
encounterNotes: Places of madness and forbidden knowledge. The ghost of a mind broken by the unknowable.

name: Maurezhi
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Assume Form
traits.desc: When the maurezhi eats a humanoid corpse, it can assume that humanoid's appearance for 24 hours.

traits.name: Rampage
traits.desc: When the maurezhi reduces a creature to 0 HP with a melee attack, it can bonus action move and make a bite attack.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes one Bite and two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6+4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8+4) slashing damage.

tactics: Three attacks plus Rampage. Eats corpses to assume their form. Infiltrates gnoll packs or humanoid settlements.
actionEconomy: Three attacks per action (bite + 2 claws) plus Rampage bonus.
encounterNotes: Gnoll warbands. The demon that leads by disguising as pack lords.

name: Nabassu
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Dead Blood
traits.desc: When the nabassu takes piercing or slashing damage, black blood sprays. Each creature within 5 ft. must succeed on a DC 18 Con save or take 14 (4d6) necrotic damage.

traits.name: Demonic Restoration
traits.desc: Regains 15 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 HP.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

traits.name: Soul Stealing Gaze
traits.desc: When a creature starts its turn within 30 ft. and both can see each other, the nabassu can force a DC 16 Cha save. On failure, the creature is frightened. If already frightened, it instead takes 16 (3d10) psychic damage and the nabassu gains that many temp HP.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes one Bite and two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6+6) piercing damage plus 16 (3d10) necrotic damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d6+6) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

tactics: Regenerates 15 HP per turn. Dead Blood damages melee attackers. Soul Stealing Gaze frightens then drains psychic. Three attacks with necrotic. Nearly impossible to kill quickly.
actionEconomy: Three attacks per action. Soul Stealing Gaze passive each enemy turn.
encounterNotes: High-level demonic encounters. A demon lord's champion.

name: Armanite
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

traits.name: Magic Weapons
traits.desc: The armanite's weapon attacks are magical.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes one Hooves attack and two Longsword attacks, or makes one Arcing Lightning attack.

actions.name: Hooves
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8+5) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8+5) slashing damage.

actions.name: Arcing Lightning
actions.desc: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d10) lightning damage, and the lightning arcs to a second target within 10 ft. of the first for 11 (2d10) lightning damage.

tactics: Three melee attacks or lightning that chains to a second target. Speed 60 ft. for charges. Demon cavalry.
actionEconomy: Three attacks per action or one Arcing Lightning hitting two targets.
encounterNotes: Demonic armies. The cavalry of the Abyss.

name: Canoloth
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Dimensional Lock
traits.desc: Other creatures within 60 ft. of the canoloth can't teleport or be moved to a different plane.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

traits.name: Uncanny Senses
traits.desc: The canoloth can't be surprised while it isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two attacks using its Bite, Tongue, or a combination.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (6d6+4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Tongue
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 30 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6+4) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 15) and restrained.

tactics: 30-ft. tongue range grapples and drags targets. Dimensional Lock prevents teleportation escape. Guard dog of the yugoloths.
actionEconomy: Two attacks per action. Tongue grapples and restrains from 30 ft.
encounterNotes: Yugoloth mercenary companies. Guards key locations — dimensional lock means no magic escape.

name: Mezzoloth
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

traits.name: Magic Weapons
traits.desc: The mezzoloth's weapon attacks are magical.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Trident attacks.

actions.name: Trident
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6+4) or 8 (1d8+4) piercing damage plus 16 (3d10) poison damage.

actions.name: Teleport
actions.desc: Magically teleports up to 60 ft. to an unoccupied space it can see.

actions.name: Power of Gehenna (1/Day)
actions.desc: Casts cloudkill, requiring no spell slot or components.

tactics: Two trident attacks with massive poison damage. Teleport for positioning. Cloudkill once per day. Rank-and-file yugoloth.
actionEconomy: Two trident attacks with poison per action. Teleport repositioning. Cloudkill 1/day.
encounterNotes: Yugoloth mercenary armies. Most common yugoloth in large battles.

name: Adult Oblex
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Amorphous
traits.desc: Can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch.

traits.name: Sulfurous Impersonation
traits.desc: As a bonus action, extrude a piece of itself that assumes the appearance of one creature whose memories it has eaten. Up to three extensions at once, each with 1 HP.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Sulfurous Tentacle attacks.

actions.name: Sulfurous Tentacle
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8+3) bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) psychic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Int save or lose a memory (proficiency bonus halved until short or long rest).

tactics: Two tentacle attacks each potentially halving proficiency bonus. Impersonates people it has eaten. The perfect infiltrator.
actionEconomy: Two tentacle attacks per action. Impersonation as bonus action.
encounterNotes: Urban environments. Could have replaced someone the party knows.

name: Elder Oblex
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Amorphous
traits.desc: Can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch.

traits.name: Sulfurous Impersonation
traits.desc: Extrudes up to 5 extensions mimicking remembered creatures.

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.desc: Int-based (spell save DC 18). At will: charm person, detect thoughts, disguise self. 3/day each: confusion, dimension door, dominate person. 1/day: feeblemind.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes three Sulfurous Tentacle attacks.

actions.name: Sulfurous Tentacle
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d10+3) bludgeoning damage plus 27 (6d8) psychic damage, and DC 18 Int save or proficiency bonus halved.

tactics: Three tentacle attacks with massive psychic damage. Feeblemind to permanently cripple a spellcaster. Five simultaneous impersonations. A city-wide threat.
actionEconomy: Three tentacle attacks plus full spellcasting.
encounterNotes: Large urban centers with time to feast on many minds.

name: Githyanki Gish
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Innate Spellcasting (Psionics)
traits.desc: Int-based (spell save DC 15). At will: mage hand (invisible). 3/day each: blur, nondetection. 1/day each: plane shift, telekinesis.

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.desc: Int-based (spell save DC 15). 3rd level: fireball, fly. 4th level: phantasmal killer, stoneskin. 5th level: cloudkill.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes four Silver Longsword attacks.

actions.name: Silver Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8+3) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) psychic damage.

tactics: Four sword attacks with psychic damage. Cloudkill for devastating AoE. Blur for defense. Telekinesis for battlefield control. Elite warrior-mage.
actionEconomy: Four attacks per action plus full spellcasting.
encounterNotes: Astral Sea and githyanki strongholds. Hunting mind flayers.

name: Githyanki Kith'rak
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Innate Spellcasting (Psionics)
traits.desc: Int-based (spell save DC 15). At will: mage hand (invisible). 3/day each: blur, jump, misty step, nondetection, telekinesis. 1/day each: plane shift, teleportation circle.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes three Silver Longsword attacks.

actions.name: Silver Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8+4) slashing damage plus 14 (4d6) psychic damage.

bonusActions.name: Rally the Troops
bonusActions.desc: The kith'rak magically ends the frightened and charmed conditions on itself and each creature of its choice within 30 ft. that it can see.

tactics: Three sword attacks with heavy psychic damage. Telekinesis and misty step. Rally the Troops removes fear/charm from allies. Squadron commander.
actionEconomy: Three attacks plus Rally the Troops bonus action.
encounterNotes: Githyanki war bands. Commands a squad of warriors.

name: Githyanki Supreme Commander
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Innate Spellcasting (Psionics)
traits.desc: Int-based (spell save DC 16). At will: mage hand (invisible). 3/day each: blur, jump, misty step, nondetection, telekinesis. 1/day each: globe of invulnerability, plane shift.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes three Silver Longsword attacks.

actions.name: Silver Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8+4) slashing damage plus 18 (4d8) psychic damage.

legendaryActions.name: Attack
legendaryActions.desc: Makes one Silver Longsword attack.

legendaryActions.name: Flight (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Flies up to half its speed.

legendaryActions.name: Rally the Troops (Costs 3 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Ends frightened and charmed on self and chosen creatures within 30 ft.

legendaryActionsNote: The supreme commander can take 3 legendary actions.
tactics: Three heavy psychic sword attacks plus legendary actions. Globe of Invulnerability vs. spells. Commands entire githyanki fleets.
actionEconomy: Three attacks plus legendary actions and full psionic suite.
encounterNotes: Githyanki invasions. Commands a nautiloid fleet or large military operation.

name: Githzerai Anarch
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Psychic Defense
traits.desc: AC includes Wisdom modifier when wearing no armor/shield.

traits.name: Innate Spellcasting (Psionics)
traits.desc: Wis-based (spell save DC 18). At will: mage hand (invisible), see invisibility. 3/day each: blur, haste, tongues. 1/day each: plane shift, teleportation circle, word of recall.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes four Unarmed Strike attacks.

actions.name: Unarmed Strike
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d10+5) bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) psychic damage.

legendaryActions.name: Strike
legendaryActions.desc: Makes one Unarmed Strike attack.

legendaryActions.name: Teleport
legendaryActions.desc: Teleports up to 30 ft. to an unoccupied space it can see.

legendaryActions.name: Mind Surge (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Each creature of the anarch's choice in a 30-foot cube must make a DC 18 Int save or take 16 (3d10) psychic damage and be stunned until the start of its next turn.

legendaryActionsNote: The githzerai anarch can take 3 legendary actions.
tactics: Four unarmed attacks with massive psychic damage. AC 20 from Wisdom. Haste for extra attack. Mind Surge stuns groups. The most powerful githzerai.
actionEconomy: Four attacks plus legendary actions and full psionic suite.
encounterNotes: Githzerai monasteries. A near-divine figure.

name: Githzerai Enlightened
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Psychic Defense
traits.desc: AC includes Wisdom modifier when unarmored.

traits.name: Innate Spellcasting (Psionics)
traits.desc: Wis-based (spell save DC 15). At will: mage hand (invisible), see invisibility. 3/day each: blur, haste. 1/day: plane shift.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes four Unarmed Strike attacks.

actions.name: Unarmed Strike
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10+4) bludgeoning damage plus 13 (3d8) psychic damage.

tactics: Four unarmed strikes with psychic damage. Haste for extra attack. A veteran monk-psion.
actionEconomy: Four attacks plus psionics.
encounterNotes: Githzerai monasteries. An elder warrior.

name: Cadaver Collector
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
languages: understands all languages but can't speak

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the cadaver collector fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Slam attacks, and uses Paralyzing Breath if available.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8+5) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage.

actions.name: Paralyzing Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Exhales a 30-foot cone of paralyzing gas. DC 17 Con save or paralyzed for 1 minute. Repeat save at end of each turn.

tactics: Two slam attacks with necrotic. Paralyzing Breath AoE can lock down an entire party. Legendary Resistance. Massive HP.
actionEconomy: Two slam attacks plus Paralyzing Breath on recharge.
encounterNotes: Ancient battlefields and mass graves. Animated by necromantic power.

name: Corpse Flower
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Corpses
traits.desc: Contains up to 9 humanoid corpses. When it takes 35+ damage in a single turn, a corpse tumbles out as a zombie with 1 HP.

traits.name: Horrible Stench
traits.desc: Each creature that starts its turn within 10 ft. must succeed on a DC 14 Con save or be poisoned until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.desc: Can climb difficult surfaces including ceilings.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes three Tentacle attacks, or uses Harvest the Dead and makes two Tentacle attacks.

actions.name: Tentacle
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6+2) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12) and restrained.

actions.name: Harvest the Dead
actions.desc: Swallows one corpse within 10 ft. and gains 10 temporary HP. On a d6 roll of 6, a zombie animates within 5 ft.

tactics: Three tentacles grapple up to two targets with poison. Horrible Stench passively poisons nearby. Corpses spawn zombies when it takes damage.
actionEconomy: Three tentacle attacks or Harvest + two tentacles.
encounterNotes: Undead-infested areas. A mobile nest of corpses.

name: Tortle
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Hold Breath
traits.desc: Can hold its breath for 1 hour.

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) slashing damage.

actions.name: Spear
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) or 6 (1d8+2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Shell Defense
actions.desc: The tortle withdraws into its shell, AC becomes 21, becomes prone, speed 0, can't take reactions, can only emerge as an action.

tactics: Shell Defense gives AC 21 when not attacking. Natural AC 17 normally.
actionEconomy: Single attack or Shell Defense.
encounterNotes: Coastal waters and tropical islands. Usually friendly.

name: Tortle Druid
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Hold Breath
traits.desc: Can hold its breath for 1 hour.

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.desc: Wis-based (spell save DC 12). At will: druidcraft, guidance, shillelagh. 2/day each: cure wounds, thunderwave. 1/day each: call lightning, plant growth.

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) slashing damage.

actions.name: Quarterstaff
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit (or +4 with shillelagh), reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 or 6 bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Shell Defense
actions.desc: Same as tortle.

tactics: Call lightning for sustained damage. Plant growth for terrain control. Shell Defense for extreme defense.
actionEconomy: Spellcasting priority. Shell Defense when cornered.
encounterNotes: Coastal communities. Spiritual leader of a tortle village.

name: Eidolon
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
languages: All languages it knew in life

traits.name: Divine Offices
traits.desc: When the eidolon manifests within a sacred statue, the statue uses the eidolon's statistics.

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
traits.desc: Can move through creatures and objects as difficult terrain.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the eidolon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8+5) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) radiant or necrotic damage (eidolon's choice).

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: Wis-based (spell save DC 16). At will: guidance, resistance, sacred flame. 3/day each: dispel magic, spiritual weapon. 1/day each: commune, flame strike, hero's feast.

legendaryActions.name: Slam
legendaryActions.desc: Makes one Slam attack.

legendaryActions.name: Blessing of the Faithful (2/Day)
legendaryActions.desc: A creature within 30 ft. gains 10 temporary HP.

legendaryActions.name: Sanctify Ground (Costs 3 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Each allied creature that starts its turn within 60 ft. regains 5 HP if it has at least 1 HP.

legendaryActionsNote: The eidolon can take 3 legendary actions.
tactics: Manifests in sacred statues. Legendary Resistance. Slam with flexible damage type. Flame Strike for AoE. Sanctify Ground regens ally HP.
actionEconomy: Two slam attacks plus legendary actions and divine spellcasting.
encounterNotes: Ancient temples. Awakened when its sacred space is desecrated.

name: Narzugon
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
damageResistances: bludgeoning/piercing/slashing from nonmagical attacks not made with silvered weapons

traits.name: Hellish Weapons
traits.desc: The narzugon's weapon attacks are magical and deal an extra 13 (3d8) psychic damage on a hit.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes three Hellfire Lance attacks.

actions.name: Hellfire Lance
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (1d12+5) piercing damage plus 13 (3d8) psychic damage.

actions.name: Infernal Command
actions.desc: Each ally within 60 ft. that isn't incapacitated must succeed on a DC 17 Wis save or be charmed until the start of the narzugon's next turn. A charmed creature must use its reaction to make one weapon attack against a target of the narzugon's choice.

legendaryActions.name: Charge
legendaryActions.desc: Moves up to half its speed.

legendaryActions.name: Hellfire Lance
legendaryActions.desc: Makes one Hellfire Lance attack.

legendaryActions.name: Terrifying Command (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Uses Infernal Command.

legendaryActionsNote: The narzugon can take 3 legendary actions.
tactics: Three psychic lance attacks. Infernal Command forces nearby creatures to attack chosen targets. Hell's cavalry commander.
actionEconomy: Three lance attacks plus legendary attacks and Infernal Command.
encounterNotes: Hell's cavalry forces. Commands devil armies.

name: Orthon
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
damageResistances: bludgeoning/piercing/slashing from nonmagical attacks not made with silvered weapons

traits.name: Devil's Sight
traits.desc: Magical darkness doesn't impede the orthon's darkvision.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

traits.name: Smoke Aura
traits.desc: When the orthon takes damage, it emits a smoke cloud. Until the end of its next turn, attack rolls against the orthon have disadvantage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Brass Crossbow attacks or one Brass Crossbow and one Infernal Dagger attack.

actions.name: Brass Crossbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8+3) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) fire damage.

actions.name: Infernal Dagger
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d6+6) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) fire damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 Con save or be poisoned for 1 minute.

actions.name: Smoke Bomb (1/Day)
actions.desc: Throws a bomb that creates a 20-foot-radius sphere of thick smoke, heavily obscured, lasting 1 minute.

tactics: Fires crossbow for massive fire damage. Smoke Aura gives disadvantage to hit when taking damage. Smoke Bomb creates cover. Infernal bounty hunter.
actionEconomy: Two ranged attacks or mixed melee/ranged each with heavy fire damage.
encounterNotes: Sent from Hell to hunt specific targets — escaped souls, contract breakers.

name: Alhoon
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the alhoon fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.desc: Int-based (spell save DC 17). Cantrips: chill touch, frostbite, mage hand, shocking grasp. 1st-4th level: darkness, detect magic, detect thoughts, lightning bolt, phantasmal killer, remove curse, scrying, thunderwave, wall of force.

actions.name: Chilling Grasp
actions.desc: Melee Spell Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (4d6) cold damage, and the target can't regain HP until the start of the alhoon's next turn.

actions.name: Mind Blast (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: 60-foot cone; DC 17 Int save or take 27 (5d8+5) psychic damage and be stunned for 1 minute.

actions.name: Paralyzing Touch (Recharge 6)
actions.desc: DC 17 Con save or paralyzed for 1 minute. Repeat save each turn.

legendaryActions.name: Tentacle
legendaryActions.desc: Makes one Chilling Grasp attack.

legendaryActions.name: Cast a Spell (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Uses Spellcasting.

legendaryActions.name: Mind Blast (Costs 3 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Uses Mind Blast if available.

legendaryActionsNote: The alhoon can take 3 legendary actions.
tactics: Mind Blast stuns groups. Chilling Grasp prevents healing. Paralyzing Touch locks down a PC. Wall of Force for isolation. A mind flayer that became undead to escape its elder brain.
actionEconomy: Chilling Grasp plus Mind Blast and spellcasting. Legendary actions extend threat.
encounterNotes: Abandoned mind flayer outposts. Brilliant, paranoid, hostile to nearly everyone.

name: Star Spawn Grue
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Aura of Madness
traits.desc: Each creature within 20 ft. that isn't an aberration must succeed on a DC 10 Wis save at the start of its turn or take 1 psychic damage and have disadvantage on all attack rolls until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Confounding Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6+1) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 10 Wis save or be frightened until the end of the target's next turn.

tactics: Aura of Madness passively gives all non-aberrations disadvantage on attacks. Stack multiple grues for a crushing debuff field.
actionEconomy: Single bite with fear. Aura of Madness passive.
encounterNotes: Far Realm incursions. Six grues together are devastating.

name: Star Spawn Mangler
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Ambush
traits.desc: On the first round of combat, has advantage on attack rolls against any creature that hasn't taken a turn yet.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes six Claw attacks. Each Claw attack that hits the same target as a previous attack in this action deals 3 (1d6) extra slashing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4+4) slashing damage.

bonusActions.name: Shadow Stealth
bonusActions.desc: While in dim light or darkness, takes the Hide action.

tactics: Six claw attacks per action, each subsequent hit on same target escalates damage. Ambush advantage on first round. A six-armed shredder.
actionEconomy: Six claw attacks per action with escalating damage on same target.
encounterNotes: Starfall sites. Appears and shreds a single target.

name: Star Spawn Hulk
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Psychic Mirror
traits.desc: If the hulk takes psychic damage, each creature within 10 ft. takes the same amount. The hulk takes no psychic damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8+5) bludgeoning damage. If Large or smaller, DC 17 Str save or be moved to an unoccupied space within 10 ft.

actions.name: Reaping Arms (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Each creature within 10 ft. makes a DC 17 Dex save, taking 28 (8d6) slashing damage on failure or half on success. Area within 10 ft. becomes difficult terrain until start of hulk's next turn.

tactics: Psychic Mirror reflects psychic damage back at casters. Two slams reposition enemies. Reaping Arms AoE on recharge. Don't use psychic spells.
actionEconomy: Two slam attacks plus Reaping Arms on recharge.
encounterNotes: Far Realm incursions. The brute — crashes through defenses.

name: Star Spawn Larva Mage
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If it fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.desc: Cha-based (spell save DC 16). At will: detect magic. 2/day each: dominate monster, Evard's black tentacles, plane shift. 1/day: hunger of Hadar.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Slam attacks, or uses Plague of Grues.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d10+3) bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) psychic damage.

actions.name: Plague of Grues (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Hundreds of grues erupt from the mage. Each creature within 20 ft. must succeed on a DC 16 Dex save or take 35 (10d6) psychic damage and be incapacitated until the start of the mage's next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Slam
legendaryActions.desc: Makes one Slam attack.

legendaryActions.name: Feed on Weakness (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: One creature within 60 ft. with 0 temporary HP takes 14 (4d6) psychic damage and is frightened until start of mage's next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Plague of Grues (Costs 3 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Uses Plague of Grues if available.

legendaryActionsNote: The larva mage can take 3 legendary actions.
tactics: Plague of Grues for AoE psychic incapacitation. Dominate Monster for control. Hunger of Hadar for area denial. Two slams with massive psychic.
actionEconomy: Two slam attacks or Plague of Grues plus legendary and spellcasting.
encounterNotes: Far Realm incursions. The spellcasting commander.

name: Star Spawn Seer
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
languages: Common, Deep Speech, Undercommon; telepathy 120 ft.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If it fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.desc: Int-based (spell save DC 19). At will: detect thoughts, levitate, mage hand. 3/day each: confusion, dimension door, suggestion. 1/day each: dominate monster, feeblemind, telekinesis.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Delusion attacks.

actions.name: Delusion
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d10+4) psychic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 19 Wis save or become frightened for 1 minute.

legendaryActions.name: Psychic Lash
legendaryActions.desc: One creature within 60 ft. takes 10 (3d6) psychic damage.

legendaryActions.name: Vision of Terror (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: One creature within 60 ft. must succeed on a DC 19 Wis save or take 22 (4d10) psychic damage and be frightened until start of seer's next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Bend Space (Costs 3 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Two creatures within 120 ft. swap positions. Each must succeed on a DC 19 Wis save or be stunned until start of seer's next turn.

legendaryActionsNote: The seer can take 3 legendary actions.
tactics: Feeblemind destroys a spellcaster. Dominate Monster for control. Bend Space repositions entire battlefield. Delusion frightens on failed save.
actionEconomy: Two Delusion attacks plus full spellcasting and legendary actions.
encounterNotes: Far Realm incursions led by guiding intelligence. Tactician of star spawn forces.

name: Yagnoloth
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

traits.name: Magic Weapons
traits.desc: The yagnoloth's weapon attacks are magical.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes one Electrified Touch attack and one Massive Arm attack, or makes two Massive Arm attacks.

actions.name: Electrified Touch
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (6d8) lightning damage.

actions.name: Massive Arm
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (3d12+4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, DC 16 Con save or stunned until end of its next turn.

actions.name: Battlefield Cunning (Recharge 4-6)
actions.desc: Up to two allied yugoloths within 60 ft. can use their reactions to each make one melee attack.

actions.name: Life Drain
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 15 ft., one creature. Hit: 26 (4d12) necrotic damage, and the yagnoloth regains HP equal to the necrotic damage dealt.

tactics: 15-ft. reach massive arm stuns on failed save. Electrified touch is burst lightning. Life Drain for sustain. Battlefield Cunning gives two allies free attacks. A yugoloth field commander.
actionEconomy: Two attacks per action. Battlefield Cunning triggers ally reactions.
encounterNotes: Yugoloth mercenary forces. Negotiates contracts and leads troops.

name: Sibriex
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Contamination
traits.desc: The sibriex corrupts the air within 30 ft. of it. Any creature that starts its turn in that area must succeed on a DC 20 Con save or take 14 (4d6) poison damage.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the sibriex fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

traits.name: Innate Spellcasting
traits.desc: Cha-based (spell save DC 21). At will: charm person, command, dispel magic, hold monster. 3/day each: feeblemind. 1/day: imprisonment.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes three Warp attacks.

actions.name: Warp
actions.desc: Ranged Spell Attack: +13 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (6d6) acid damage, and DC 20 Con save or restrained for 1 minute.

actions.name: Squirt Bile (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: 30-foot cone. DC 20 Con save or take 35 (10d6) poison damage and be poisoned for 1 minute on failure.

legendaryActions.name: Cast a Spell
legendaryActions.desc: Uses Innate Spellcasting.

legendaryActions.name: Warp (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Makes one Warp attack.

legendaryActions.name: Contamination Wave (Costs 3 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Each creature in 30 ft. makes a DC 20 Con save or take 21 (6d6) poison damage and have Wis reduced by 1d4.

legendaryActionsNote: The sibriex can take 3 legendary actions.
tactics: Contamination aura poisons every turn. Warp restrains targets. Feeblemind destroys spellcasters. Imprisonment for the big threat. Ancient demon who knows secrets of the Abyss.
actionEconomy: Three Warp attacks per action plus legendary and spellcasting.
encounterNotes: Ancient demonic sites. Present at the creation of the Abyss. Knows reality-altering secrets.

name: Wastrilith
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.desc: Can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

traits.name: Undertow
traits.desc: Bonus action while in water: force each creature of its choice within 30 ft. in the water to succeed on a DC 18 Str save or be pulled up to 30 ft. toward the wastrilith.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes one Bite and two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d12+4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (4d6+4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Corrupted Water (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Contaminates all water in a 60-foot cube. DC 18 Con save or take 35 (10d6) acid damage and be poisoned for 1 minute.

tactics: Undertow pulls creatures into melee. Three attacks with long reach. Corrupted Water for AoE acid/poison. Aquatic demon ruler.
actionEconomy: Three attacks per action. Undertow as bonus action in water.
encounterNotes: Aquatic demonic encounters. Commands aquatic demons in underwater Abyssal regions.

name: Bael
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
damageResistances: bludgeoning/piercing/slashing from nonmagical attacks not made with silvered weapons

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If Bael fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

traits.name: Magic Weapons
traits.desc: Bael's weapon attacks are magical.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes three Hellfire attacks.

actions.name: Hellfire
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d8+7) slashing damage plus 16 (3d10) fire damage. On a hit, the target is frightened until the start of Bael's next turn on a failed DC 21 Wis save.

legendaryActions.name: Infernal Command
legendaryActions.desc: Each ally of Bael within 60 ft. gains a d10 bonus to its attack rolls until the start of Bael's next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Terrifying Strike (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Makes one Hellfire attack. On a hit, the target is frightened until the end of its next turn on a failed DC 21 Wis save.

legendaryActions.name: Summon Devils (Costs 3 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Summons 2d6 bearded devils, 1d4 chain devils, or one horned devil.

tactics: Three hellfire attacks each frighten on hit. Infernal Command buffs all allies with d10 to attacks. Summon Devils for reinforcements. The Bronze General of Hell.
actionEconomy: Three attacks plus legendary and Infernal Command.
encounterNotes: Hell or major infernal incursions. Commands legions of devils. Very willing to negotiate.

name: Moloch
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
damageResistances: bludgeoning/piercing/slashing from nonmagical attacks not made with silvered weapons

traits.name: Fear Aura
traits.desc: Any creature hostile to Moloch within 20 ft. must succeed on a DC 21 Wis save at the start of its turn or be frightened until start of its next turn.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If Moloch fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes three Hellfire Greatclub attacks.

actions.name: Hellfire Greatclub
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d8+7) bludgeoning damage plus 22 (4d10) fire damage.

legendaryActions.name: Subjugate
legendaryActions.desc: One creature within 60 ft. must succeed on a DC 21 Wis save or be frightened and charmed by Moloch for 1 minute.

legendaryActions.name: Hellfire Blast (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 35 (10d6) fire damage.

legendaryActions.name: Summon Devils (Costs 3 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Summons 2d4 bearded devils, 2d4 chain devils, or one pit fiend.

tactics: Fear Aura frightens enemies passively. Three 15-ft. reach attacks with fire. Subjugate to charm and frighten. Summon pit fiend. An archdevil of war.
actionEconomy: Three attacks plus legendary and Fear Aura.
encounterNotes: Phlegethos or major infernal incursions. Exiled archdevil — desperate and dangerous.

name: Geryon
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
damageResistances: bludgeoning/piercing/slashing from nonmagical attacks not made with silvered weapons

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If Geryon fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

traits.name: Magic Weapons
traits.desc: Geryon's weapon attacks are magical.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes one Claw and one Stinger attack.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +16 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (4d6+9) slashing damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 24) and restrained. Geryon can grapple one creature at a time.

actions.name: Stinger
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +16 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d4+9) piercing damage plus 27 (6d8) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 20 Con save or become poisoned and paralyzed. Repeat save at end of each turn.

actions.name: Frightful Presence
actions.desc: Each creature of Geryon's choice within 120 ft. must succeed on a DC 21 Wis save or become frightened for 1 minute.

legendaryActions.name: Infernal Glare
legendaryActions.desc: One creature within 120 ft. must succeed on a DC 23 Wis save or be frightened until start of Geryon's next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Swift Sting (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Makes one Stinger attack.

legendaryActions.name: Teleport (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Teleports up to 120 ft.

tactics: Claw grapples and restrains, then stinger paralyzes the held target with massive poison. Frightful Presence to frighten all. Stinger reaches 20 ft. Teleport for repositioning.
actionEconomy: Claw + stinger per action. Legendary stinger for extra paralysis.
encounterNotes: Stygia layer of Hell. Geryon is exiled — bitter and extremely dangerous.

name: Vampiric Mist
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Life Sense
traits.desc: Can sense the presence and location of any creature within 60 ft. that has blood.

traits.name: Misty Form
traits.desc: Can occupy another creature's space and move through any opening air can pass through.

traits.name: Sunlight Hypersensitivity
traits.desc: Takes 10 radiant damage at start of turn in sunlight.

actions.name: Blood Drain
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (2d6+3) necrotic damage, and the mist regains HP equal to the damage dealt. The target's HP maximum is reduced by the same amount until it finishes a long rest.

tactics: Enters through any crack. Life Sense detects all blooded creatures within 60 ft. Drains blood and reduces HP max while healing itself.
actionEconomy: Single Blood Drain attack with self-healing.
encounterNotes: Vampire lairs and cursed swamps. Weakens prey before a vampire feeds.

name: Sword Wraith Warrior
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
languages: The languages it knew in life

traits.name: Martial Fury
traits.desc: When the warrior takes the Attack action, it can make one Longsword attack as a bonus action. If both attacks hit the same target, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) necrotic damage.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8+4) slashing damage, or 9 (1d10+4) if two-handed, plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

bonusActions.name: Martial Fury
bonusActions.desc: Makes one bonus Longsword attack (see trait).

tactics: Longsword plus bonus action longsword — both hits add 2d8 necrotic. Two necrotic sword attacks per turn from an undead warrior that won't stop fighting.
actionEconomy: Two longsword attacks per turn via Martial Fury.
encounterNotes: Ancient battlefields and barrows. The undead of warriors who died with unfinished battles.

name: Sword Wraith Commander
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
languages: The languages it knew in life

traits.name: Martial Fury
traits.desc: When the commander takes the Attack action, it can make one Longsword attack as a bonus action. If both attacks hit the same target, the target takes an extra 13 (3d8) necrotic damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Longsword attacks.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8+5) slashing damage, or 10 (1d10+5) if two-handed, plus 13 (3d8) necrotic damage.

actions.name: Animating Cry (Recharge 6)
actions.desc: Each sword wraith warrior within 30 ft. that can hear it gains 10 temporary HP and can immediately use its reaction to make one Longsword attack.

tactics: Three attacks per turn. Each hit adds 3d8 necrotic. Animating Cry gives all nearby warriors temp HP and a free attack.
actionEconomy: Three attacks per turn (2 multiattack + 1 Martial Fury). Animating Cry for army-wide free attack.
encounterNotes: Ancient battlefields. Commands a warband of sword wraith warriors.

name: Trapper
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: False Appearance
traits.desc: While motionless, indistinguishable from a section of floor, wall, or ceiling.

actions.name: Smother
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one Large or smaller creature. Hit: The creature is grappled (escape DC 13) and must succeed on a DC 13 Con save or be restrained and unable to breathe or speak. At the start of each of the trapper's turns, the target takes 17 (5d6) bludgeoning damage.

tactics: Disguised as floor/wall/ceiling. Wraps around victim and crushes. Can't breathe while smothered. Automatic 5d6 per turn.
actionEconomy: Single Smother attack. Automatic damage each turn while smothering.
encounterNotes: Caves and dungeons. Often missed until it wraps around the rearguard.

name: Vargouille
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Mimicry
traits.desc: Can mimic sounds of human screaming. DC 10 Insight to recognize as imitation.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (2d4+1) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 12 Con save or be cursed. While cursed, target can't regain HP and takes 3 (1d6) psychic damage every 24 hours. If the target dies while cursed, its head tears free and becomes a vargouille.

actions.name: Shriek (Recharge 6)
actions.desc: Each creature within 30 ft. that can hear and isn't a Fiend must succeed on a DC 12 Con save or be paralyzed until end of target's next turn. If the target fails by 5 or more, it is also frightened while paralyzed.

tactics: Bite curses target — prevents healing and kills slowly, creating more vargouilles. Shriek paralyzes everyone nearby.
actionEconomy: Single bite with curse. Shriek on recharge for AoE paralysis.
encounterNotes: Demonic encounters and cursed places. The curse must be cured quickly.

name: Elder Tempest
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Air Form
traits.desc: Can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. Can move through any opening at least 1 inch wide.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the elder tempest fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Siege Monster
traits.desc: Deals double damage to objects and structures.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d10+8) bludgeoning damage plus 11 (2d10) lightning damage.

actions.name: Lightning Strike (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: One creature within 120 ft. must make a DC 21 Dex save. On failure, takes 99 (18d10) lightning damage. On success, half damage. The lightning arcs to a second target within 30 ft. for 55 (10d10) lightning damage (DC 21 Dex for half).

legendaryActions.name: Wind Burst
legendaryActions.desc: Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere must succeed on a DC 22 Str save or be pushed 20 ft. and knocked prone.

legendaryActions.name: Slam (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Makes one Slam attack.

legendaryActions.name: Lightning Strike (Costs 3 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Uses Lightning Strike if available.

legendaryActionsNote: The elder tempest can take 3 legendary actions.
tactics: Lightning Strike hits one target for 18d10 and arcs for 10d10 more. Two massive slams. Wind Burst pushes and knocks prone. A living storm.
actionEconomy: Two slam attacks plus legendary. Lightning Strike for apocalyptic burst.
encounterNotes: Elemental incursions or where ley lines of storm power converge.

name: Zaratan
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the zaratan fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Siege Monster
traits.desc: Deals double damage to objects and structures.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. Hit: 32 (4d10+10) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is swallowed. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, has total cover, and takes 21 (6d6) acid damage at the start of each of the zaratan's turns.

actions.name: Spit Rock
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, range 120/480 ft., one target. Hit: 36 (4d12+8) bludgeoning damage.

legendaryActions.name: Rumble
legendaryActions.desc: Each creature in contact with the ground within 60 ft. must succeed on a DC 25 Str save or fall prone.

legendaryActions.name: Bite (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Makes one Bite attack.

legendaryActions.name: Spit Rock (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Uses Spit Rock.

legendaryActionsNote: The zaratan can take 3 legendary actions.
tactics: Swallows creatures whole. Spit Rock for long-range boulders. Rumble knocks everyone prone. A living island.
actionEconomy: Two bite attacks plus legendary.
encounterNotes: Ocean encounters or coastal destruction. Looks like a rocky island until it moves.

name: Leviathan
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the leviathan fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Siege Monster
traits.desc: Deals double damage to objects and structures.

traits.name: Water Breathing
traits.desc: Can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (4d8+10) bludgeoning damage plus 14 (4d6) cold damage.

actions.name: Tidal Wave (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Creates a wave in a 60-foot-wide, 120-foot-long area. All creatures in the area must make a DC 19 Str save or take 35 (10d6) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone and pushed up to 60 ft. On success, half damage only.

legendaryActions.name: Surge
legendaryActions.desc: Moves up to half its swim speed.

legendaryActions.name: Slam (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Makes one Slam attack.

legendaryActions.name: Tidal Wave (Costs 3 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Uses Tidal Wave if available.

legendaryActionsNote: The leviathan can take 3 legendary actions.
tactics: Two slams with cold damage. Tidal Wave knocks prone and flings creatures 60 ft. Legendary Resistance. The ocean made manifest.
actionEconomy: Two slam attacks plus legendary.
encounterNotes: Deep ocean or Elemental Plane of Water. The apex of aquatic elemental power.

name: The Wretched
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Sorrowsworn
traits.desc: The wretched deals 7 (2d6) extra damage to a creature if at least one other wretched is within 5 ft. of the target.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes one Bite and one Claw attack.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4+3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4+3) slashing damage.

tactics: Swarms for extra damage. Two attacks per turn. Weak individually but terrifying in numbers.
actionEconomy: Two attacks per action. Swarm bonus when two or more are adjacent.
encounterNotes: Shadowfell. The lowest of the sorrowsworn — manifested suffering.

name: The Hungry
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Sorrowsworn
traits.desc: At the start of each of its turns, if it can see a creature it attacked during its last turn, it gains 10 temporary HP.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d10+5) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) psychic damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 17) and restrained if Large or smaller.

actions.name: Spit Tether
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 30 ft., one target. Hit: The target is tethered — can't move more than 30 ft. from the Hungry. DC 17 Str to break.

tactics: Grapples with devastating bite. Spit Tether locks down a second target. Gains 10 temp HP each turn while pursuing the same target.
actionEconomy: Two bite attacks plus Spit Tether for range control.
encounterNotes: Shadowfell. Pursues prey relentlessly. Represents starvation and longing.

name: The Lonely
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Sorrowsworn
traits.desc: When the lonely ends its turn without an ally within 60 ft., it takes 20 psychic damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Embrace attacks.

actions.name: Embrace
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d8+3) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 15) and restrained. The restrained target takes 10 (3d6) psychic damage at the start of each of its turns.

actions.name: Forlorn Pining
actions.desc: One creature restrained by the lonely must succeed on a DC 15 Wis save or be charmed for 1 minute. While charmed, the creature regards the lonely as a beloved friend.

tactics: Embraces and restrains, dealing psychic damage. Charms the restrained victim into thinking it's a friend.
actionEconomy: Two Embrace attacks plus Forlorn Pining.
encounterNotes: Shadowfell. Represents isolation. Attempts to keep its 'friends' close forever.

name: The Lost
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Sorrowsworn
traits.desc: At the start of the lost's turn, each creature within 30 ft. must succeed on a DC 13 Wis save or lose the ability to use Dash until the start of the lost's next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d8+2) slashing damage.

actions.name: Hamstring
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4+2) slashing damage, and the target's speed is halved until the start of the lost's next turn.

tactics: Aura prevents Dash. Hamstring halves movement. Traps victims in place.
actionEconomy: Two attacks per action. Aura passive at start of each turn.
encounterNotes: Shadowfell. Manifests from the suffering of being lost.

name: The Angry
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Sorrowsworn
traits.desc: When the angry takes damage from a creature, it gains advantage on all attack rolls against that creature until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (4d6+6) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Wave of Fury (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Each creature in a 30-foot cone must make a DC 15 Str save, taking 36 (8d8) bludgeoning damage and being knocked prone on failure.

tactics: Gains advantage on attacks against anything that hurts it. Two massive slams. Wave of Fury AoE knockdown. Hitting it makes it angrier and more accurate.
actionEconomy: Two slam attacks plus Wave of Fury on recharge.
encounterNotes: Shadowfell. Represents uncontrollable anger. Fighting it empowers it.

name: Mindwitness
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Telepathic Hub
traits.desc: If the mindwitness is targeted by a telepathy spell, the caster can communicate telepathically with all creatures the mindwitness chooses within 600 ft.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes one Bite and four Eye Ray attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (4d6+2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Eye Rays
actions.desc: The mindwitness shoots two random magical eye rays at targets within 120 ft. Roll 2d4: 1-Dazing (DC 13 Wis or incapacitated), 2-Fear (DC 13 Wis or frightened), 3-Freezing (DC 13 Con or speed halved and AC reduced by 2), 4-Telekinetic (DC 13 Str or moved 30 ft.).

tactics: Five attacks per turn (1 bite + 4 eye rays). Telepathic Hub relays communications for a mind flayer colony. A beholder reimagined.
actionEconomy: One bite plus four eye rays per action.
encounterNotes: Mind flayer colonies. A captured beholder repurposed as a communication relay.

name: Molydeus
source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

traits.name: Demonic Weapons
traits.desc: The molydeus's weapon attacks are magical and ignore resistance from nonmagical attacks.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the molydeus fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes one Demonic Weapon attack and one Snake Bite attack.

actions.name: Demonic Weapon
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (2d10+9) slashing or bludgeoning damage plus 22 (4d10) lightning or fire damage.

actions.name: Snake Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d6+6) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 20 Con save or take 99 (18d10) poison damage on failure or half on success.

legendaryActions.name: Attack
legendaryActions.desc: Makes one Demonic Weapon attack.

legendaryActions.name: Fling
legendaryActions.desc: One Large or smaller creature grappled by the molydeus is thrown up to 60 ft. in a random direction, falling prone. Takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage per 10 ft. thrown.

legendaryActions.name: Summon Demons (Costs 3 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: Summons 1d6 vrocks, 1d4 hezrous, or 1d2 glabrezus.

legendaryActionsNote: The molydeus can take 3 legendary actions.
tactics: Demonic Weapon deals mixed elemental damage. Snake Bite can deal 99 poison damage on a bad save. Summon Demons to overwhelm. A demon lord's bodyguard and executioner.
actionEconomy: One weapon attack + one snake bite per action plus legendary.
encounterNotes: Demon lords' throne rooms. The most elite demonic soldiers.
